description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure with stylized, angular features and exaggerated proportions. The figure is positioned in a dynamic, leaning pose, with limbs extended and body partially enveloped by large, abstract, wing-like structures. The head is clearly defined, with short hair and a neutral facial expression, while the arms and legs are elongated and somewhat distorted. The clothing appears form-fitting and streamlined, suggesting a modern or athletic style. The overall form is highly geometric, with sharp edges and flat surfaces dominating the silhouette. The asset's construction gives it a surreal, almost sculptural appearance, blending human and abstract elements.
description: A stylized adult human figure in a dynamic pose, partially enveloped by large, angular, wing-like structures and wearing streamlined, form-fitting clothing.
description_view_0: The figure's upper body and head are visible, with angular limbs and large, black, wing-like extensions dominating the scene.
description_view_1: The side profile reveals the head, short hair, and the figure's arm, with the wing-like structures extending outward and partially obscuring the body.
description_view_2: The view is mostly dominated by the abstract, black extensions, with only the top of the head and part of the body visible beneath the structures.
description_view_3: The back and side of the figure are visible, with the head and neck extended forward and the angular, wing-like forms sweeping behind.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting athletic wear with streamlined, abstract extensions
